Uses of Package
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure

Packages that use io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure
Package
Description
io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure
Spring Boot auto-configuration and the configuration-property surface for clustering.
  • Classes in io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure used by io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.autoconfigure
    Class
    Description
    BatchClusterDataSourceScriptDatabaseInitializer
    Optionally creates the cluster coordination tables (BATCH_NODES, BATCH_JOB_COORDINATION, BATCH_PARTITIONS, BATCH_JOB_PHASE_EVENTS) on startup, mirroring Spring Batch's own schema initialization.
    BatchClusterProperties
    Configuration for database-coordinated Spring Batch clustering, bound from the spring.batch.cluster.* namespace.
    BatchClusterProperties.HostIdentifier
     
    ClusterJobRepositoryValidator
    Fails fast at startup when clustering is enabled but the active JobRepository is the in-memory ResourcelessJobRepository — the Spring Batch 6 default.
